aKSealPouchIsAStandUpBagWithAD: A K-seal pouch is a stand-up bag with a diagonal (K-shaped) bottom seal rather than a traditional horizontal U-seal.
thisConstructionUsesLessSealin: This construction uses less sealing area, creating more usable internal volume without increasing overall pouch dimensions.
